description: CompositionBlue hooded sweatshirt made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester, has long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, hoodie with drawstrings, zippered closure on the front, patch pockets on the sides of the zipper, embroidered swoosh logo on the upper left chest, embroidered numbering on the upper right chest, printed numbering on the back and a ribbed hemlineFittingRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not dry clean or bleachTumble dry on lowCool iron onlyDo not iron on print or embroideryThis blue hooded jacket from the nike Bleed Blue collection is inspired by classic street style staples. The blue colour is extracted from the Indian cricket team colours, while the thick fabric along with the hoodie offers extra insulation. Team this with tees and jeans.
